name: email
description: Email — read inbox, send to whitelisted contacts via IMAP/SMTP
author: sapphire

event_sources.name: email_message
event_sources.label: New Email
event_sources.description: New unread email received on an account

task_fields.label: Auto-reply to sender
task_fields.help: When enabled, the AI's response is automatically sent as an email reply to the sender.

settings.label: Poll Interval (seconds)
settings.help: How often to check for new emails. Minimum 30 seconds.
